title: Clean active bedrock vault and preserve historical context
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done: the repo currently has a noisy active ./bedrock tree plus a divergent legacy ./agent-knowledge tree. Clean ./bedrock so it only contains relevant durable knowledge and small generated views, preserve historical context, and avoid destructive loss by merging or pointing to older history where needed.

title: Simplify Bedrock public model to Memory Work Views
description: Session 1 of the Bedrock vNext cockpit change. Update default init structure, generated templates, docs, and compatibility path handling so the public model is Memory/ Work/ Views/ while preserving legacy folders and non-destructive behavior for existing projects.

title: Retire legacy agent-knowledge vault after final migration audit
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done: ./bedrock is now the active vault and older durable history/imports were copied forward, but the legacy ./agent-knowledge tree still exists in the repo. Audit any remaining unique files, decide whether it can be removed or archived, and update docs/config so only one active vault remains.

title: Continue Bedrock vNext cockpit follow-up work
description: Follow-up to the session-1 Memory/Work/Views simplification. Remaining work includes optional work-focused CLI surfaces such as the work or brief commands, broader docs cleanup, deeper migration utilities for old vaults, and additional project cockpit UX polish that was intentionally left out of session 1.

title: Continue Bedrock vNext cockpit follow-up work
